brief.speaker: oldrich
brief.text: Who do I see the most of? I'd like to know who I owe a cup to. Or who I should be charging more. Top five, most visits first.

expected.sql: SELECT patron_id, COUNT(*) AS visits FROM visits GROUP BY patron_id ORDER BY visits DESC, patron_id LIMIT 5

hints.text: Oldrich: 'Top five only. I don't need the whole list.'
Oldrich: 'GROUP BY needs the same column you're not aggregating. patron_id, in this case.'
Oldrich: 'Count visits per patron. Top five, most visits first.'

success.speaker: oldrich
success.text: Oldrich nods. 'Pavel. Sounds right. He's been miserable since his wife died — drinks like a fish, leaves like a ghost.'
